/usr/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -static -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/user/user.ld CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/ansi.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/keymap.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/request.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/text_buffer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/embedded_shell.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/shell_io.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/consoled.sys.dir/shell_cmds.cpp.obj -o ../../../consoled.sys  ../../../lib/libviperlibc.a ../../../lib/libvipergui.a
